data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Service contract integration (parts covered)', which is a critical component of the linked use case. However, the evidence does not provide any confirmation that the service contract covers the parts, as it only mentions the costs associated with the parts and labor without detailing the integration of the service contract. This constitutes a gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected result was to confirm coverage or identify a precise gap.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the service contract covers the parts.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for service contract integration
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the service contract includes coverage for parts.
